heading: Omitted
label: 594 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for the distribution of funds to the Mississippi Bands and the Pillager and Lake Winnibigoshish Bands of Chippewa Indians for certain claims and exempted such distributions from Federal and State income taxes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–94, § 181 Stat. 230Sept. 27, 1967
